intro: I'm a data analyst who believes that the best stories are told through numbers — and through the places we visit.
paragraphs: By day, I dive deep into datasets, uncover patterns, and turn raw numbers into meaningful insights. I love the moment when a messy spreadsheet transforms into a clear narrative that drives real decisions.

But when I close my laptop, I open the map. Traveling is how I recharge and find fresh perspective. Every new city, trail, and conversation with a stranger reminds me that the world is full of stories waiting to be discovered.
